app_release_notes: v1.2.20 - The Targets library can now print and delete. Right-click a target photo to Print it (a page opens in your browser with a Print button) or Delete it; right-click a load's name to delete all of that load's target photos at once. Deleting a photo never changes your scored result - it only removes the picture. Left-click a photo to view it full size; right-click for those options.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.2.20 - The Targets library can now print and delete. Right-click a target photo to Print it (a page opens in your browser with a Print button) or Delete it; right-click a load's name to delete all of that load's target photos at once. Deleting a photo never changes your scored result - it only removes the picture. Left-click a photo to view it full size; right-click for those options.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.19 - Three screens printed their text the same color as the background and are readable again: the Settings window's title, the 'backups to keep' number in Settings, and the Cancel button on Create New Load. Entering a retired beta code now tells you it was retired and points you at the key from your purchase email, instead of saying it looks like a typo. The Workbook menu now says Create New Load, matching the rest of the app.
